1.title: What Gender?

11432.content: Nick when he was a Cop or Criminal?
11432.title: Human?

choices: Get on top of the stand and get his attention there
114322.content:
You wake up on something cold and hard, thinking you just fell of your bed while sleeping, you think nothing of it. But when you open your eyes, you can’t believe it, that hard surface you were on was a sidewalk. You’ve shrunk and your in the middle of a giant city!

While laying there in complete shock, thudding footsteps land right next to you and you realize the danger you’re in while sitting here. As you stand up, you get a look at of few of the passerby’s, but, they’re animals, walking like humans? You saw an anthropomorphic elephant, tiger, and a wolf, to name a few. Looking over to your right was a store window with a TV playing in it, it looked like the news. You decided to go over and have a look, trying to get a better understanding of the situation you’re in.

As you approach the TV, you see that the anchors are also anthropomorphic animals. They start talking and you listen

“Good morning Zootopia....” those were the first and last words you heard, they were all you needed to hear. YOU’RE IN ZOOTOPIA?!

Any logical explanation for any of this is out the window, how is this possible? Shrinking is crazy enough as it is, but being in Zootopia is a completely different story. You can’t freak out too much though, you figure the best way to fix all of this is getting someone’s attention.

Every time you see a pedestrian walk by, you scream up and try to get their attention, but as quickly as they show up, they leave, there’s no way you can get their attention if they just keep walking. Then you look to the corner of the street, you see what looks to be some type of vendor selling popsicles, and it looks like a fox wearing a green shirt and tie. You find this the perfect opportunity to get someone’s attention, a professional vendor is almost obliged to help the customer with anything, so you make your way on down.

Once you get closer, you’re met with a sudden realization, that’s not just some vendor, that’s Nick Wilde! You felt the need to pass out but you kept your balance. This day just keeps getting stranger and stranger. You have to put some more thought into this before you advance, if this is when Nick Wilde was selling popsicles, then that means this is when he was more criminal. Can you trust him? Maybe he’ll just pick you up and sell you? Or maybe he won’t, you don’t know, but you’ve decided to continue anyway.

How will you get his attention?
114322.title: Criminal

info.brief_description: A lovable former con artist gets a little surprise and goes to his new home for fun.
info.description: Anything goes. But Nick stays normal as a character of the movie or yourself gets shrunk somehow. Have fun.
